title: Consolidation News
content:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Thank you for the opportunity and privilege to introduce our new consolidated solutions and services offered by Knowledge and Intelligence group.

Company Overview

Brief History

Knowledge and Intelligence was founded by Emeka Ikwukeme. Emeka Ikwukeme is a certified public accountant with over 20 years’ experience from the petroleum industry, retail, pharmaceuticals, logistics, software development. In 2015, Emeka Ikwukeme launched the Ireland Tax Calculator, and within a short period due to demand for tax computation from prospective customers in the United Kingdom and United States, Emeka built UK Tax Calculator and US Tax Calculator and combined all calculators into one platform called Tax GO.

In 2018, Emeka launched Parcel-King as a logistics firm working as sub-contractors for GLS Ireland and within two years, they grew into one of the biggest logistics firms in Ireland. They now boast of customers like UPS, Amazon, Keelings, Primeline, TPN, JMC and many more.

In 2019, Emeka launched Retail Xpress as a retail solution for small and medium scale businesses. Which kicked off the campaign and challenge of setting up a retail store in 5 minutes. As Retail Xpress is an app and web platform that does not need POS, scanner or card reader to make a retail sale and receive payments.

In 2020, Irshad Kalladi Kunnummal joined the company as Chief technology officer, with over 10 years in software development experience from working with Emirates Airlines to groundbreaking software development projects. Due to Covid 19, which delayed the launch of the new products and today we are happy to present our esteem products to you.

In 2024, The staff and management decided to combine all the companies under one umbrella called Knowledge and Intelligence group. This groups comprises of the following companies;

title: Retail History
content:
Retail has a rich history dating back centuries, evolving from small market stalls to elaborate department stores and now into digital platforms like Retail Xpress. The importance of retail to the community lies in its role as a vital economic engine, providing goods and services while fostering local economies and creating job opportunities.

Retail Xpress, as an app and platform, revolutionizes the retail landscape by offering a cost-effective solution for small and medium-scale businesses. By eliminating the need for traditional point of sale systems and heavy equipment costs, Retail Xpress empowers businesses to thrive in the digital age without the burden of large investments. This accessibility can fuel entrepreneurship, drive innovation, and stimulate economic growth on a global scale, benefiting both businesses and their communities.
